content.text:
[cron:feee69f8-6016-4f8f-a09c-08b39d9a9191 github-backup] Run these commands: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" || (git commit -m "auto backup" && git push). Report result to Nemesis via message(action=send, channel=telegram, target=7924461837) only if there was an error. If nothing changed, reply NO_REPLY.
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 - 1:01 PM (UTC) / 2026-04-12 13:01 UTC

content.thinking:
This is a cron job for git backup. Let me run the commands as specified.

The logic is:
1. cd to workspace
2. git add -A
3. git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" || (git commit -m "auto backup" && git push)

If nothing changed (nothing to commit), I should reply NO_REPLY.
If there was an error, I should report to Nemesis via message.
If there was a commit and push, I should also reply NO_REPLY (since it says "only if there was an error").

Let me run this.

arguments.command: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" || (git commit -m "auto backup" && git push)
